infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is needed to photograph ECG printouts for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is needed to upload ECG images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photo library access is needed to save ECG analysis results.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ECG Interpreter to access your photos to upload ECG images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ECG Interpreter to use the camera to photograph ECG printouts.
